scenario:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP Max-Forwards: 70 X-InteliServe-CampaignID: 2599001 X-InteliServe-ABBR: ACME4 X-InContact-ContactId: 121328474140 X-InContact-BusNo: 4597504 X-InContact-CallType: BlindXfer X-BXFERPARENTID: 121328474135 X-InteliServe-SubOrg: EMEA X-InteliServe-LANG: GBR_en X-InteliServe-DNIS: +18005554001 X-InteliServe-Term-ANI: +61410653861 X-InteliServe-Term-DNIS: +14694985896 X-InteliServe-Term-LOC: DLC X-InteliServe-Term-Telco: GTT X-InteliServe-Term-CallID: 371500946_64991673@7.240.2.6^M X-InContact-Originating-Device: fra-e31med01 X-InContact-CallDebugInfo: Blind XFER X-InContact-DcasRouteGroup: eunbs_bgid1 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000/1 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000
ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=TCP SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
BYE [$1] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP CSeq: 2 BYE [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
-->
